summary: Autopilot Suggestions feature fully tested and working. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend verified: Top Priority card shows 'SUGGESTED ACTION' label with action name, 'Approve & Send' (teal) and 'Edit' buttons. Clicking 'Approve & Send' calls POST /api/autopilot/execute, shows toast notification ('Sent X to Y'), removes the item from inbox (count decreases). Edit navigates to relevant pages (support-pods, roster). For 'No coach assigned' items, only 'Edit' is shown with 'Assign coach' nudge. Inbox hover nudges still work. Actions logged to autopilot_log collection.
critical_code_review_comments: autopilot.py correctly handles all 4 action types (check_in, follow_up, request_doc, assign_coach)
DirectorInbox.js properly shows/hides Approve button based on canAutoExecute flag
Message templates are pre-filled and customizable
Autopilot logs audit trail to autopilot_log collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Autopilot feature complete. POST /api/autopilot/execute creates messages in support_messages and logs to autopilot_log. Top Priority card has 'Approve & Send' + 'Edit' buttons. For 'No coach assigned', only Edit shows. Test IDs: top-priority-card, autopilot-approve-btn, autopilot-edit-btn, inbox-row-{id}, nudge-{id}

verified_features.1_autopilot_execute_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/autopilot/execute works for check_in, follow_up, request_doc, assign_coach
verified_features.2_response_structure: PASS - Returns status, action_type, message, detail fields
verified_features.3_top_priority_suggested_action: PASS - Shows 'SUGGESTED ACTION' label with action name
verified_features.4_approve_send_button: PASS - Teal button calls API and shows toast
verified_features.5_edit_button: PASS - Navigates to relevant page (support-pods, roster, etc.)
verified_features.6_item_removal_after_approve: PASS - Top Priority card removed, inbox count decreased by 1
verified_features.7_no_coach_assigned_only_edit: PASS - 'No coach assigned' items only show Edit (no Approve & Send)
verified_features.8_inbox_hover_nudges: PASS - Nudges appear on row hover with correct labels
verified_features.9_autopilot_logging: PASS - Actions logged to autopilot_log collection
